channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Zoom’s Anthropic investment has netted the company $1 billion
item.description: The total value of Zoom’s stake in the rapidly ascendant AI company is worth about $1.27 billion, according to a regulatory filing Friday. That value is primed to increase further as Anthropic nears the completion of another funding round as soon as next week. [Anthropic]

item.title: Navitas Semiconductor NVTS Stock Jumps Nearly 20% on AI Power Demand and Analyst Upgrades in 2026
item.description: Navitas Semiconductor's shares rose nearly 20% due to AI infrastructure momentum and analyst price target increases, despite reporting a Q1 net loss. The company focuses on high-power markets.

item.title: Seven ways AI is making 2025 tech layoffs different from Silicon Valley’s earlier job cuts
item.description: Tech layoffs in 2025 are increasingly targeting middle management and coordination-heavy roles as companies restructure around AI. Firms like Amazon, Meta and Shopify are pushing flatter hierarchies, AI-first hiring and smaller teams instead of broad pandemic… [Amazon, Meta, Shopify]

item.title: Sketchy Imbalances In Data Training Are Distorting AI-Generated Mental Health Guidance
item.description: Most people do not realize that AI has imbalances due to the initial training of the AI. This is worrisome for AI giving out mental health advice. An AI Insider scoop.

item.title: AI Could Unlock $500 Billion for Oil and Gas Producers by 2030
item.description: Digitalization and artificial intelligence (AI) will create close to $500 billion in cumulative value for E&P companies between 2026 and 2030, according to Rystad Energy estimates. This value is captured through cost reductions from more efficient operations,… [Intel]

item.description: With Harry Stebbings, Jason Lemkin, and Rory O’Driscoll Anthropic is in talks for $30 billion at a $900 billion valuation. That’s nearly triple the $380 billion price from February. Andre Karpathy joined Anthropic the same week. Cerebras priced its IPO at $18… [Salesforce, Anthropic]
